mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_voiceprint (userId, deviceId, voiceprintName, embedding, sampleCount, state, createTime) VALUES (#{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{voiceprintName}, #{embedding}, #{sampleCount}, #{state}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_voiceprint SET embedding = #{embedding}, sampleCount = #{sampleCount}, updateTime = NOW() WHERE voiceprintId = #{voiceprintId} AND state = '1'
mapper.select: SELECT voiceprintId, userId, deviceId, voiceprintName, embedding, sampleCount, state, createTime, updateTime FROM sys_voiceprint WHERE userId = #{userId} AND state = '1' ORDER BY createTime DESC
SELECT voiceprintId, userId, deviceId, voiceprintName, embedding, sampleCount, state, createTime, updateTime FROM sys_voiceprint WHERE voiceprintId = #{voiceprintId} AND state = '1'

SELECT v.voiceprintId, v.userId, v.deviceId, v.voiceprintName, v.embedding, v.sampleCount, v.state, v.createTime, v.updateTime FROM sys_voiceprint v INNER JOIN sys_device d ON d.userId = v.userId WHERE d.deviceId = #{deviceId} AND v.state = '1' ORDER BY v.createTime DESC

SELECT voiceprintId, userId, deviceId, voiceprintName, embedding, sampleCount, state, createTime, updateTime FROM sys_voiceprint WHERE userId = #{userId} AND voiceprintName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND state = '1'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_voiceprint WHERE userId = #{userId} AND state = '1'
